title: Define Q3 success metrics for AI features
body: Align with product and data teams on what we're measuring — task creation rate, retention, AI call latency. Document in Notion.

title: Set up Inarch SDK in staging environment
body: Install @inarch/sdk, wrap the Anthropic client, verify calls are being logged to .inarch/calls.db before we go to prod.

title: Write onboarding doc for new engineers
body: Cover local setup, env vars, how to run the demo app, and how to read the Inarch call logs.

title: Compare claude-haiku vs claude-sonnet on task extraction
body: Run 50 natural language inputs through both models. Compare accuracy and token cost. Use Inarch branches: haiku-test vs sonnet-test.

title: Fix date parsing edge case in chat API
body: When users say 'next Friday' without a year, the parser sometimes returns the wrong date. Add a regression test.

title: Schedule demo with design team
body: Walk them through the chat-to-todo flow and get feedback on the popover detail view.

title: Publish @inarch/sdk to npm
body: Run npm publish from packages/sdk. Make sure dist/ is built and the README is current before publishing.

title: Add streaming support to Inarch SDK
body: Layer 2 work — intercept streamed responses and log token counts once the stream closes.

title: Set up error alerting for AI call failures
body: If Anthropic returns a 5xx or rate limit, we should alert in Slack and log the failed call in .inarch/calls.db.

title: Write prompt for natural language task extraction
body: Draft and iterate the system prompt used in the chat-to-todo feature. Goal: extract title, due date, and shared-with from a single message.

title: Review Q2 product roadmap
body: Reviewed the roadmap doc and left comments on the AI features section. Instrumentation milestones confirmed.

title: Bootstrap todo-demo-app repo
body: Created Next.js app with Clerk auth, Drizzle + SQLite, and basic CRUD API. Pushed to inarch-labs/todo-demo-app.

title: Scaffold @inarch/sdk package
body: Implemented types, db layer, OpenAI and Anthropic adapters, wrap() entry point. Typecheck and smoke test passing.

title: Switch auth from NextAuth to Clerk
body: Removed Google Cloud project requirement. Clerk handles identity; simplified schema to just the todos table.

title: Add sample data loader to demo app
body: Added 'Load sample todos for testing' button and POST /api/todos/seed endpoint. Blocks if todos already exist.

title: Add drag-to-reorder on active list
body: Implemented native HTML5 drag-and-drop. Persists order via sortOrder column. New todos prepend at top.

title: Design token cost dashboard for Inarch
body: Wireframe a simple view that reads .inarch/calls.db and shows cost by branch, model, and session over time.

title: Document Inarch SDK public API
body: Write JSDoc for createInarch(), wrap(), and InarchConfig. Add usage examples to the README.

title: Write integration test for Anthropic adapter
body: Hit a real Anthropic endpoint in CI with a minimal prompt, assert the call record is written to SQLite correctly.

title: Set up Vercel deployment for demo app
body: Deploy todo-demo-app to Vercel. Configure Clerk production keys and set DATABASE_URL for a persistent SQLite or Turso DB.
